for d in ~/ChiroHD/Alina-*; do
  if [ -d "$d" ]; then
    echo "=== $(basename "$d") ==="
    ls -la "$d" | head -8
    if [ -d "$d/.git" ]; then
      echo "branch: $(git -C "$d" branch --show-current)"
    fi
  fi
done

for pr in 120 123 119 115 90; do
  echo "=== PR $pr ==="
  gh pr view $pr --repo ChiroHD/Alina --json title,reviewDecision,isDraft,mergeStateStatus,reviews,comments --jq '{title,reviewDecision,isDraft,mergeState:.mergeStateStatus,reviews:(.reviews|map({author:.author.login,state:.state})),commentCount:(.comments|length)}' 2>/dev/null
done
